title: The most important river in the American West is drying up | The Economist
description: The federal government is forcing states to act
bodyText: For a look behind the scenes of our data journalism, sign up to Off the Charts, our weekly newsletter Small men have won over social media, but continue to struggle in the dating market Perish the thought. But we tracked how artificial intelligence is changing five creative fields American universities are selling ever more, just when their value is eroding A huge study suggests ageing scientists are part of the problem Why it is hard to monetise football’s atmosphere Our tracker suggests it has suffered its first sustained net loss since October 2023
